name: oh-my-pi-plugin-morph
description: oh-my-pi extension for Morph Fast Apply and WarpGrep tools

apiKey.label: Morph API key
apiKey.description: API key used by Morph-backed tools and compaction.

editModel.label: Fast edit model
editModel.description: Morph Apply model for fast_edit: auto, morph-v3-fast, or morph-v3-large.

warpgrepEnabled.label: Enable local WarpGrep
warpgrepEnabled.description: Register codebase_warpsearch for local repository search.

warpgrepGithubEnabled.label: Enable GitHub WarpGrep
warpgrepGithubEnabled.description: Register github_warpsearch for public GitHub repository search.

routingHintEnabled.label: Enable routing hints
routingHintEnabled.description: Inject per-turn system hints that prefer Morph tools where appropriate.

compactRatio.label: Compaction ratio
compactRatio.description: Target fraction to keep for Morph compaction. Valid range: 0.05 to 1.
